The '''Khoan''' were a species who, though shorter than [[Human/Legends|Humans]], weighed twice the average [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]]. They had yellow skin, a dorsal fin, and spikes on their faces. These spikes fanned around the face, forming a spiked collar around their faces. Khoan imagined themselves as the fairest of all intergalactic races.

A Khoan played against [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in [[fan-tan]] at the [[Fifteen Moons Casino/Legends|Fifteen Moons Casino]] on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
